summary: Outstanding late‑80s performance highlighted by a spectacular mariachi‑style La Bamba, with no reported recording problems.
review: Both reviewers gush about this concert as one of the best late‑80s shows, singling out Garcia’s natural take on La Bamba as a special treat. While they focus on the musical excitement and give it five stars, they provide no details on the audio source, implying the recording is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high (5‑star) reviews emphasize an exceptional show; lack of technical criticism suggests the recording is adequate, leading to a strong overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not comment on sound quality or source, indicating no noticeable issues but also providing no specific praise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a high‑energy late‑80s concert that flows strongly throughout, with the La Bamba moment highlighted as a unique highlight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s mariachi‑style performance on La Bamba is called natural and special.
